utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check completeness: 
- health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs (details mention both; cost provided). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs (details mention home and contents; cost provided). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs (details describe travel insurance coverage; cost provided). Fully specified.
- additional_services: any enhancement services with costs (states no additional services with separate costs; cost €0). Fully specified.
- total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown (both monthly and annual totals provided). Fully specified.
